scripts.setup-fonts: DIST=node_modules/@campstudio/camp-ui-kit/dist && if [ -d "$DIST" ]; then mkdir -p $DIST/fonts && cp public/fonts/*.ttf $DIST/fonts/ && cd $DIST/fonts && for f in *.ttf; do b="${f%.ttf}"; cp "$f" "$b.woff2"; cp "$f" "$b.woff"; done && cd - > /dev/null && CSS=$(ls $DIST/styles-*.css 2>/dev/null | head -1) && [ -n "$CSS" ] && ln -sf $(basename $CSS) $DIST/styles.css; fi
